name: filter_messages
description: Allows the user to filter messages based on different categories such as unread, known, unknown, starred, images, videos, places, or links.
parameters: {'filter_category': 'Which message category do you want to view? ["Unread", "Known", "Unknown", "Starred", "Images", "Videos", "Places", "Links"]'}

name: search_messages
description: Allows the user to search for specific messages using keywords or phrases.
parameters: {'search_query': 'What would you like to search for in your messages?'}

name: go_back
description: Navigates the user back to the previous screen.
